metadata.description: luna-brain — OSS Obsidian vault skeleton for Claude Code workflows. Marketplace ships SHA-pinned vault-knowledge + markdown-helper plugins. Pair with obsidian-second-brain (installed separately via its upstream install.sh) for PARA capture/daily/project skills.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Steph Ango's Claude Skills for Obsidian: obsidian-markdown (OFM syntax), obsidian-bases, json-canvas, obsidian-cli, defuddle. Used for correct Obsidian Flavored Markdown in your own vault edits. Pinned to SHA.
